{"query":"Apple Intelligence China availability regulatory requirements Siri AI not available in China 2026 Apple official statement","model":"mako","response_time_ms":903,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2026/06/apple-unveils-next-generation-of-apple-intelligence-siri-ai-and-more/","title":"Apple unveils next generation of Apple Intelligence, Siri AI, and more - Apple","content":"CUPERTINO, CALIFORNIA Today, during the Worldwide Developers Conference, Apple previewed its upcoming software releases that will deliver the next generation of Apple Intelligence and introduce Siri AI, an entirely new version of Siri that is profoundly more intelligent, knowledgeable, and capable.
Apple Intelligence is available with support for these languages: English, Danish, Dutch, French, German, Italian, Norwegian, Portuguese, Spanish, Swedish, Turkish, Vietnamese, Chinese (simplified), Chinese (traditional), Japanese, and Korean.
Apple Intelligence and Siri AI in iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, watchOS 27, and visionOS 27 are available on iPhone 16 models or later, iPhone 15 Pro, iPhone 15 Pro Max, iPad mini (A17 Pro), iPad models with M1 or later, MacBook Neo (A18 Pro), Mac with M1 or later, Apple Vision Pro, Apple Watch Series 9 or later, Apple Watch Ultra 2 or later, and Apple Watch SE 3 when paired with an Apple Intelligence-enabled iPhone nearby.
Increased access is available with most iCloud+ subscription plans, which also include Apple Intelligence support for compatible Home cameras.
Siri AI and the other new Apple Intelligence features will not be available in China while Apple works through regulatory requirements.
For more information about availability, visit apple.com.
AirDrop tested by transferring multiple photos totaling 30MB between nearby contacts while not associated with a Wi-Fi network.

The new enhanced Siri AI features that Apple announced today at WWDC 2026 will not be available in the European Union or in China when they are released in beta later this year. Apple said that while Siri AI will be available for free with the new upcoming OS releases, it will not be available in the EU on iOS and iPadOS until it can find a path forward for regulatory approval. Apple said EU regulators did not accept any of the company's proposed solutions to bring Siri AI to the EU while safely supporting other virtual assistants. \"Our hope is to eventually bring Siri AI to the EU, and we will continue to engage with EU regulators on a path forward. When iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 launch later this year, Apple will not offer Siri AI or its new features on those platforms in the EU.","score":0.79196626,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://tech.sportskeeda.com/mobiles/why-siri-ai-apple-intelligence-skipping-eu-china-launch-privacy-concerns-explained","title":"Why is Siri AI and Apple Intelligence skipping EU and China at launch? Privacy concerns explained","content":"* Why is Siri AI and Apple Intelligence skipping EU and China at launch? Siri AI not releasing in the EU and China (Image via Apple). Apple recently announced Siri AI and Apple Intelligence-integrated iOS 27 and macOS Golden Gate at the WWDC 2026. ## Siri AI and Apple Intelligence are skipping the EU and China due to regional laws. The biggest hurdle for Siri AI and Apple Intelligence to enter the European market is the Digital Markets Act (DMA). New Siri AI presented at WWDC 2026 (Image via Apple). If you use a Mac or an Apple Watch in the EU, you are in luck, as those devices are exempt from the gatekeeper rules and will still get the updates. For now, if you are in either of these regions, you will have to patiently wait for Apple to meet all the regulations to release the much-awaited Siri AI and Apple Intelligence features. * All devices confirmed to get Siri AI.","score":0.7413937,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://tech.yahoo.com/ai/apple-intelligence/articles/apple-intelligence-cleared-launch-china-140340366.html","title":"Apple Intelligence is cleared to launch in China (but not the EU yet)","content":"# Apple Intelligence is cleared to launch in China (but not the EU yet). When Apple announced major changes to its Apple Intelligence set of features in June, it came with a big caveat: Almost none of the features were available in the European Union and China. According to Reuters, Apple Intelligence has been registered with China's cyberspace regulator. The new features are coming in iOS 27 and other new Apple platforms which are currently in beta; this development paves the way for them to launch in September, when iOS 27 is scheduled to launch proper. However, Reuters says that the regulator's statement did not give a precise launch date for the AI features in China. In June, Apple said that the features were delay in the EU for iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 due to Europe's Digital Markets Act (DMA). At the time, the company said it does \"not currently have a timeline for Siri AI's availability on iOS and iPadOS in the EU.\".","score":0.69845337,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y4RrdW6wfKY","title":"Bad News for Apple Users: Siri AI Blocked in the EU and ...","content":"China: Siri AI and all related Apple Intelligence features are completely on hold while Apple works through local compliance requirements.","score":0.6601948,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.2,"request_id":"6dc0e63b-3c2d-4f7c-a7d4-044fe6fb3ef7"}
